wine_experiences.name: The Ruinart Lunch
wine_experiences.description: A four-course lunch in the Maison Ruinart dining room paired with Ruinart cuvees, offered Fridays and Saturdays. Guests can add a visit to the UNESCO-listed chalk.
wine_experiences.duration: Around 2 to 3 hours including optional cellar visit
wine_experiences.price_range: From around EUR 150 per person; cellar visit extra

wine_experiences.name: Moet & Chandon Terroir Treasures Experience
wine_experiences.description: A vineyard-focused Moet & Chandon experience taking guests into the estate vines around Epernay, with a vineyard walk, cellar access and a Grand Vintage pairing.
wine_experiences.duration: Around half a day with vineyard visit and tasting
wine_experiences.price_range: Up to around EUR 235 per person for the private vineyard experience

wine_experiences.name: Vintage 2CV Tour with Sabrage in the Vines
wine_experiences.description: A three-hour My Vintage Tour Company experience through the vineyards in a classic Citroen 2CV, with a tasting in the vines, sabering and a cellar visit.

wine_experiences.name: Champagne Vineyard Helicopter Flight
wine_experiences.description: Sightseeing helicopter flights over the Montagne de Reims vineyards and Reims Cathedral from the Reims-Prunay aerodrome. Baptism flights and vineyard circuits.
wine_experiences.price_range: Scenic flights from around EUR 90 per person; private charters higher

verified.address_quoted: Route de Mourmelon in Prunay, postal code 51360

wine_experiences.name: Vendangeur d'un Jour Harvest Experience
wine_experiences.description: A grape-picker-for-a-day programme created by the Grand Reims tourist office and independent winegrowers. During the September harvest, guests pick and press.
wine_experiences.price_range: From around EUR 60 per person during harvest season
wine_experiences.group_size: Small groups with a host winegrower

wine_experiences.name: Mercier Little-Train Cellar Experience
wine_experiences.description: The only laser-guided little-train ride through champagne cellars, at Mercier in Epernay. A panoramic lift descends to the 18 kilometres of tunnels for a train.
wine_experiences.price_range: From around EUR 20 per person; premium tastings higher
